name: Interlochen Golf Course
about: Interlochen Golf Course is an 18-hole public golf facility located seven miles west of Traverse City, Michigan. The venue features two state-of-the-art golf simulator bays alongside its traditional outdoor course, allowing for year-round play. The facility includes Bradley's Pub & Grille, a full-service restaurant and bar, creating a comprehensive golf and dining experience. Simulators offer access to 85+ global courses and swing analysis technology, while memberships provide discounts on pro shop merchandise and dining.
why_golfers_like_it: 85+ global courses available for simulator play
Advanced swing analysis with aboutGolf technology and aG Locker app integration
Year-round access with indoor climate-controlled bays
Dining on-site at Bradley's Pub & Grille with course views

food_and_drink.notes: Full lunch and dinner menu at Bradley's Pub & Grille featuring favorites and local selections, plus smokehouse options. Online ordering available.
Full bar service at Bradley's Pub & Grille, open until 10pm, with craft cocktails and beer selections.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art system with high-speed cameras and swing analysis capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You must bring your own clubs to use the golf simulators. The venue does not specify rental equipment availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. Bradley's Pub & Grille serves lunch and dinner year-round with an extensive menu and full bar available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One golfer can complete 18 holes in approximately one hour in the simulator bays. Hourly rates accommodate up to 6 golfers per bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Interlochen Golf Course is kid-friendly, offering junior membership for players 17 and under with 30% off all rates, and family-friendly amenities at Bradley's Pub & Grille.
